# Daily Report — 2026-06-19

## Task Completed
Added `close_change_task` tool to `change_tools.py`. The tool patches a `change_task` record
with a closed state (3=Closed Complete by default, 4=Closed Incomplete, or 7=Closed Skipped).
Accepts the task by CTASK number or sys_id via the existing `_resolve_change_task_sys_id` helper.
Optional `close_notes` and `work_notes` fields. Returns the normalised task record via `_format_change_task`.
Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (change_coordinator and full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1709
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing third-party vulnerabilities in setuptools, urllib3, wheel — no new issues.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — imported and exported `close_change_task`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported params + function, added registry entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `close_change_task` to change_coordinator and full packages
- `tests/test_close_change_task.py` — 17 new tests
